_comment: 홈 타이틀 배경 이미지 10장. taisho_roman 스타일. 9:16 세로 비율 (576x1024).
style_prefix: Taisho Roman art nouveau illustration, ornate decorative frame border with cherry blossoms and vines, Japanese dark fantasy aesthetic, vertical portrait composition,
style_suffix: , art nouveau ornamental details, sakura petals, moonlit atmosphere, muted indigo and silver palette, masterpiece, best quality

items.title: 시계탑의 늑대
items.prompt: wolf silhouette howling atop a gothic clock tower against an oversized full moon, dark tiled rooftops stretching below, cherry blossom petals drifting upward, misty mountain backdrop, deep midnight blue and silver

items.title: 대나무 숲길
items.prompt: mysterious bamboo forest path at night with paper lanterns floating, glowing wolf eyes peering through bamboo stalks, thick mist rolling along a stone pathway, ethereal blue-green moonlight filtering through leaves

items.title: 마을의 밤
items.prompt: aerial view of a moonlit village with traditional tiled rooftops at night, a central courtyard with scattered wooden tablets on a low table, hooded figures gathered in a circle, warm amber lantern glow contrasting cold moonlight

items.title: 청동 거울
items.prompt: ornate bronze mirror reflecting a wolf face instead of the viewer, surrounded by burning incense and talisman papers, mystical purple and silver energy swirling around the mirror, dark lacquered shrine interior

items.title: 횃불 재판
items.prompt: dramatic torchlit tribunal scene, accused figure kneeling in firelight surrounded by officials pointing fingers, dramatic shadows on wooden pillars, flames casting orange glow upward into darkness, tension and judgment

items.title: 폭풍의 성문
items.prompt: fortress gate silhouette against dramatic storm clouds with lightning, wolf banners fluttering on ramparts, a lone cloaked figure holding a traditional lantern at the massive wooden gate, rain and wind, dark steel blue and white flash

items.title: 예언자의 비전
items.prompt: mystical seer performing divination with a glowing crystal sphere, swirling cosmic vision of wolves and villagers inside the orb, scattered tarot cards and dried herbs on silk cloth, purple and gold supernatural glow

items.title: 묘지의 보름달
items.prompt: ancient cemetery under a massive full moon, ornate stone monuments and iron crosses casting long shadows, a translucent ghostly wolf spirit rising from the ground, twisted cherry trees with falling petals, eerie silver moonlight and ground fog

items.title: 주막의 음모
items.prompt: interior of a traditional tavern at midnight, cloaked figures whispering around a low table with face-down wooden tablets and sake cups, warm oil lamp glow against paper sliding doors, shadow of a wolf cast on the wall, intimate conspiratorial atmosphere

items.title: 새벽의 대치
items.prompt: dramatic pre-dawn hilltop with pine and cherry trees, two silhouetted figures facing each other in a standoff, one human one casting a wolf shadow, first sunrise rays breaking through dark clouds, golden edge lighting against indigo sky
